case_title: STEPHEN PAUL NAGHDI VS. AVERRA-MCKENNAN HOSPITAL

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

MALPRACTICE - MEDICAL/DENTAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAGHDI, STEPHEN PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT AVERRA-MCKENNAN HOSPITAL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-09-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-07-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-24-2009

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-09-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-25-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAGHDI, STEPHEN PAUL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST STEPHEN PAUL NAGHDI, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-15-2009 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-30-2009. ARLENE HOWELL, CSR#2542. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-25-2009 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-25-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. (212)
